creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 154727
svn diff for devel/cvstrac

I really like this port, or rather, the svn && git versions.
And as I see development has stalled upstream, perhaps I can
take over development, and improve it further, or at least
push commits upstream.

CHANGES:

adds MAINTAINER

That's it!

OH, and just for fun, I'm also attaching a QA session LOG. :)

Thanks!

--Chris
